name: GULFPORT ENERGY CORP
business: Gulfport is an independent natural gas-weighted exploration and production company with assets primarily located in the Appalachia and Anadarko basins. It sells natural gas, oil, and NGLs produced from the Utica/Marcellus formations in eastern Ohio and the SCOOP Woodford and Springer formations in central Oklahoma. Sales are made to purchasers under both spot and term transactions.
sellsTo: Wholesale natural gas, oil, and NGL purchasers

exposures.sentence: Gulfport is an independent natural gas-weighted exploration and production company with assets primarily located in the Appalachia and Anadarko basins.

catalysts.sentence: Our 2026 capital expenditure program is expected to be in a range of $400 million to $430 million, including $35 million to $40 million on maintenance land and seismic investments.

catalysts.event: 2026 production target of 1.030-1.055 Bcfe per day
catalysts.sentence: We expect this development program to result in approximately 1.030 to 1.055 Bcfe per day of production in 2026.

catalysts.event: Complete drilling on 18 gross operated horizontal wells and commence sales on 20 gross operated horizontal wells in Utica
catalysts.sentence: In the Utica, we intend to complete drilling on approximately 18 gross (17.5 net) operated horizontal wells and commence sales on approximately 20 gross (19.5 net) operated horizontal wells.

catalysts.event: Complete drilling on 6 gross and commence sales on 4 gross operated horizontal wells in Marcellus
catalysts.sentence: In the Marcellus, we intend to complete drilling on approximately 6 gross (5.6 net) and commence sales on approximately 4 gross (4.0 net) operated horizontal wells.

catalysts.event: Complete drilling and commence sales on 2 gross operated horizontal wells in SCOOP
catalysts.sentence: In the SCOOP, we intend to complete drilling and commence sales on approximately 2 gross (1.7 net) operated horizontal wells.
